overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest at night, navigating a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense trees. The footage appears to be from a horror or exploration video game, with very low visibility and minimal ambient lighting.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense dark forest at night along a narrow dirt trail. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the path with minimal ambient light, creating a narrow enclosed environment. A fallen log appears on the left side as the camera moves forward.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, approaching and passing a trail marker sign on a tree

entered.detail: white rectangular trail marker sign attached to a tree trunk ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest path, a white trail marker sign becomes visible on a tree ahead, indicating a marked hiking route. The camera approaches the sign, passes it, and continues deeper into the dark woods as the surrounding trees recede into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic, dark forest that gradually reveals a marked hiking route. It begins by navigating a narrow dirt trail flanked by towering pine trees that create a dense, enclosed environment under minimal ambient light. As the camera moves forward, it passes a fallen log on the left before the path opens slightly to reveal a white trail marker sign attached to a tree ahead. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and passes the marker, continuing deeper into the oppressive darkness of the woods. Finally, the surrounding trees recede into the distance as the journey progresses further along the marked route.
